name: Vec4
Particle
mojo_driver:
def main():
    var p = Particle(0.0, 0.0, 3.0, 4.0)
    p.step(2.0)
    print(p.px)
    print(p.py)
    print(p.speed())
    p.step(0.5)
    print(p.px)

name: Counter3
mojo_driver:
def main():
    var c = Counter3()
    c.inc()
    c.inc()
    c.add(10)
    print(c.get())
    c.inc()
    print(c.get())

name: Stats
mojo_driver:
def main() raises:
    var xs: List[Float64] = [3.0, -1.0, 7.0, 2.0, 5.0]
    var s = Stats.from_list(xs)
    print(s.mn)
    print(s.mx)
    print(s.sum)
    print(s.mean())

name: BoxT
PairT
mojo_driver:
def main():
    var p = Pair[Int](7, 11)
    print(p.get_first())
    print(p.get_second())
    p.swap_pair()
    print(p.get_first())
    print(p.get_second())

name: TripleT
mojo_driver:
def main():
    var t = Triple[Float64](1.0, 2.0, 3.0)
    print(t.last())
    t.rotate()
    print(t.a)
    print(t.b)
    print(t.c)

Accumulator2
mojo_driver:
def main():
    var a = Accumulator2()
    a.push(2.0)
    a.push(4.0)
    a.push(9.0)
    print(a.sum)
    print(a.count)
    print(a.mean())

name: Pose2
mojo_driver:
def main():
    var p = Pose2(0.0, 0.0, 0.0)
    p.translate(3.0, 4.0)
    p.rotate(1.5)
    print(p.x)
    print(p.y)
    print(p.theta)
    print(p.dist_origin())

name: AABB2
Frac2
Ray2
Wallet
mojo_driver:
def main():
    var w = Wallet(100)
    print(Int(w.spend(30)))
    print(w.balance())
    print(Int(w.spend(200)))
    print(w.balance())
    w.deposit(50)
    print(w.balance())
